title: Contribute to a proposal for a negotiated outcome related to Country
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Contribute to a proposal for a negotiated outcome related to Country demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Gather information to support a proposal for a negotiated outcome

pcs.text: Identify, gather, record and store information required to support the proposal development
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, gather, record and store information required to support the proposal development?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, gather, record and store information required to support the proposal development.

pcs.text: Review legislation and government policies and plans of management relevant to the proposal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review legislation and government policies and plans of management relevant to the proposal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review legislation and government policies and plans of management relevant to the proposal.

pcs.text: Undertake consultation about the proposal with stakeholders, including Traditional Owners or Cultural Authorities, local Community groups and other organisations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake consultation about the proposal with stakeholders, including Traditional Owners or Cultural Authorities, local Community groups and other organisations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake consultation about the proposal with stakeholders, including Traditional Owners or Cultural Authorities, local Community groups and other organisations.

pcs.text: Identify and record areas of potential conflict between different legislation and local cultural protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record areas of potential conflict between different legislation and local cultural protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record areas of potential conflict between different legislation and local cultural protocols.

pcs.text: Define the scope of available alternatives for management and/or resolution of land and waterways use issues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define the scope of available alternatives for management and/or resolution of land and waterways use issues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define the scope of available alternatives for management and/or resolution of land and waterways use issues.

pcs.text: Investigate and document potential circumstances under which different alternatives can be applied
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and document potential circumstances under which different alternatives can be applied?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and document potential circumstances under which different alternatives can be applied.

pcs.text: Define processes to implement alternatives and relate to both mainstream ideas and culturally appropriate approaches
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define processes to implement alternatives and relate to both mainstream ideas and culturally appropriate approaches?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define processes to implement alternatives and relate to both mainstream ideas and culturally appropriate approaches.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Relate information about the expected outcomes of a proposal to stakeholders during proposal development process.

pcs.text: Identify main characteristics of any relevant state or territory and Commonwealth legislation that apply to the specified area

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify main characteristics of any relevant state or territory and Commonwealth legislation that apply to the specified area.
